title: pinus fenzeliana subsp. kwangtungensis
intro: Pinus fenzeliana subsp. kwangtungensis, also known as the Kwangtung pine, is a subspecies of pine tree native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pinus fenzeliana subsp. kwangtungensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Pinus fenzeliana subsp. kwangtungensis is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
